nasb.text: I gave them My statutes and informed them of My ordinances, by which, if a man observes them, he will live.

esv.text: I gave them my statutes and made known to them my rules, by which, if a person does them, he shall live.

cnv.text: 我把我的律例賜給他們，把我的典章指示他們；人如果遵行，就必因此活著。

ccb.text: 向他们颁布我的律例和典章，若有人遵守，就必活着。
